Hero.description: The modern, high-energy hub built for teams that demand excellence. Track attendance, unleash performance, and enforce accountability continuously.

HowItWorks.title: Clear Path to the Pitch
HowItWorks.heading: How It Works
HowItWorks.description: We built our onboarding to be entirely frictionless. Get your whole team connected and organized before your next training session.

step1.name: Sign Up Free
step1.description: Create your account in seconds using your email or Google account.

step2.name: Join Your Club
step2.description: Find your existing team or create a brand new club space for your squad.

step3.name: Manage Together
step3.description: Track attendance, collect funds, and organize events in one central hub.

Capabilities.description1: Our management infrastructure automates the admin work,
Capabilities.description2: so you can focus entirely on the match.

attendance.title: ATTENDANCE
attendance.description: Never chase players on WhatsApp again. Automated RSVPs, instant squad views, and strict cutoffs to ensure you always have numbers.

finances.title: FINANCES
finances.description: Total transparency on match fees and club dues. Track who paid, who owes, and manage the seasonal budget without the headache.

statistics.title: STATISTICS
statistics.description: Vote for MVP, track goalscorers, and analyze attendance reliability. Build a culture of performance and accountability.

events.title: Events & RSVPs
events.heading: NEVER PLAY SHORT-HANDED.
events.content: Schedule matches and training sessions instantly. Players RSVP with one tap, and you always know exactly who is showing up. Send automated reminders to those who forget.

finance.title: Club Finances
finance.heading: TRANSPARENT LEDGER.
finance.content: Ditch the chaotic spreadsheets. Track member dues, match-day subs, and log equipment purchases directly against player accounts. Complete visibility for the whole team.

team.title: Roster Management
team.heading: SQUAD IN YOUR POCKET.
team.content: Keep all player contact info, preferred positions, and emergency details secure in one place. Easily assign Admin capabilities to your coaching staff.

performance.title: Performance
performance.heading: GAMIFY YOUR CULTURE.
performance.content: Automatically track attendance rates across the season. Vote for Man of the Match and keep historical data to reward your most dedicated players at the end of the year.

Showcases.description: Management systems that deliver tangible improvements to your club's efficiency, turnout, and financial health.

attendance.title: ATTENDANCE VISIBILITY
attendance.description: Clubs report perfect visibility into who is showing up to match days.

time.title: TIME SAVED
time.description: Average time saved per week by managers cutting out WhatsApp chasing.

finance.title: FEE RECOVERY
finance.description: Increase in recovered match fees through transparent digital ledgers.

1.body: This app transformed how we run Sunday League. We used to chase people down on WhatsApp for subs and attendance. Now it's completely automated.
1.author: Marcus T.

2.body: Finally, a clean interface for amateur sports. It looks professional, and our players actually enjoy checking the app to see who is coming to training.
2.author: Sarah Jenkins

3.body: The finance tracking alone makes it worth it. Knowing exactly who has paid match fees and what our remaining pitch budget is saves me hours of headache.
3.author: David Chen

FinalCta.description: Stop chasing payments and attendance on WhatsApp. Get your whole squad aligned and ready to play today.
